scripts.deploy: pnpm turbo run build --filter @prisma/example-storage... && ( set -a; . "${PRISMA_DEPLOY_ENV:-../../.env}"; set +a; bun node_modules/.bin/prisma-compose deploy module.ts ${STORAGE_STACK_NAME:+--name "$STORAGE_STACK_NAME"} )
scripts.destroy: ( set -a; . "${PRISMA_DEPLOY_ENV:-../../.env}"; set +a; bun node_modules/.bin/prisma-compose destroy module.ts --production ${STORAGE_STACK_NAME:+--name "$STORAGE_STACK_NAME"} )
